pageContext.name: Thor
pageContext.description: A new version of the colorful hero of 'Mighty Thor,' featuring 'new method' sculpting and Tamashii digital coloring for a lifelike appearance! In addition to a face so accurate we had to clear the portraiture rights with Chris Hemsworth, a powerful-looking Stormbreaker, lightning effect parts, and a cape with internal wires for posability make this Thor collectible one of the most dynamic portrayals of the hero ever made!  Add to your Marvel collection!
